title: lecanthus corniculatus
intro: Lecanthus corniculatus, also known as the horned lily or horned gloria, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lecanthus corniculatus include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lecanthus corniculatus typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
